question: How do I retrieve the stdout output for a failed AAP job?
correct_answers: Use the AAP API GET endpoint /api/v2/jobs/<job-id>/stdout/?format=txt with admin credentials
curl -s -u admin:<token> https://<aap-url>/api/v2/jobs/<job-id>/stdout/?format=txt

question: What are the common root causes when an Ansible Automation Platform job fails?
correct_answers: Unreachable target host, credential error, missing variable, or underlying resource not in expected state
Playbook task failure due to unreachable host, bad credentials, missing variable, or resource state mismatch

question: How do I re-launch a failed AAP job via the API?
correct_answers: POST to /api/v2/jobs/<job-id>/relaunch/ with an empty JSON body {}
curl -s -u admin:<token> -X POST https://<aap-url>/api/v2/jobs/<job-id>/relaunch/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}'

question: What command checks the expiry date of a TLS certificate stored in an OpenShift secret?
correct_answers: oc get secret <tls-secret> -n <namespace> -o jsonpath='{.data.tls\.crt}' | base64 -d | openssl x509 -noout -enddate
Decode tls.crt from the secret with base64 -d and run openssl x509 -noout -enddate

question: How do I force cert-manager to re-issue an expired certificate?
correct_answers: Annotate the Certificate resource with cert-manager.io/issue-once set to the current Unix timestamp
oc annotate certificate <cert-name> -n <namespace> cert-manager.io/issue-once="$(date +%s)"

question: After manually rotating a TLS secret, what deployment must be restarted?
correct_answers: oc rollout restart deployment/nginx -n <namespace>
Rollout restart deployment/nginx in the namespace after applying the new tls secret

question: Which namespace and pods should I check when DNS resolution fails in the cluster?
correct_answers: Check pods in openshift-dns with oc get pods -n openshift-dns and oc logs -l dns.operator.openshift.io/daemonset-dns -n openshift-dns --tail=50
Inspect CoreDNS in the openshift-dns namespace using the dns-default daemonset label selector

question: How do I restart CoreDNS on OpenShift?
correct_answers: oc rollout restart daemonset/dns-default -n openshift-dns
Rollout restart the dns-default daemonset in openshift-dns

question: What dnsPolicy should pods use for cluster DNS resolution?
correct_answers: dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
ClusterFirst (the default pod DNS policy)

question: How do I check consumer group lag for a Kafka consumer group?
correct_answers: oc exec -it <kafka-pod> -n <namespace> -- bin/kafka-consumer-groups.sh --bootstrap-server localhost:9092 --describe --group <group-id>
Run kafka-consumer-groups.sh with --describe --group against localhost:9092 inside the kafka pod

question: When scaling Kafka consumers to reduce lag, what constraint must not be exceeded?
correct_answers: Consumer replicas must not exceed the topic partition count
Do not scale deployment/<consumer> above the number of partitions on the topic

question: How do I increase partitions on a Kafka topic to 6?
correct_answers: oc exec -it <kafka-pod> -n <namespace> -- bin/kafka-topics.sh --bootstrap-server localhost:9092 --alter --topic <topic> --partitions 6
Use kafka-topics.sh --alter --topic <topic> --partitions 6 on the kafka pod

question: What nginx log message indicates an upstream connection timeout?
correct_answers: upstream timed out (110: Connection timed out)
Logs showing upstream timed out with error 110 Connection timed out

question: What commands verify that a Kubernetes service has healthy endpoints?
correct_answers: oc get endpoints <service> -n <namespace> and oc describe service <service> -n <namespace>
Check endpoints and describe the service in the namespace

question: What temporary nginx proxy timeout values can be added to nginx.conf?
correct_answers: proxy_read_timeout 120s; proxy_connect_timeout 30s;
Set proxy_read_timeout to 120s and proxy_connect_timeout to 30s

question: How do I validate nginx configuration inside a running pod?
correct_answers: oc exec <pod> -n <namespace> -- nginx -t
Run nginx -t via oc exec on the pod in the namespace

question: What is the rollback procedure when nginx fails to reload due to bad config?
correct_answers: oc rollout undo deployment/nginx -n <namespace> followed by oc rollout status deployment/nginx -n <namespace>
Rollout undo deployment/nginx and wait for rollout status to complete

question: Which ConfigMap holds nginx configuration and how is it applied after editing?
correct_answers: nginx-config ConfigMap — edit it and rollout restart deployment/nginx
Edit configmap nginx-config with oc edit configmap nginx-config -n <namespace>, then oc rollout restart deployment/nginx -n <namespace>

question: What backoff pattern does CrashLoopBackOff follow for nginx pods?
correct_answers: Exponential backoff from 10s to 20s to 40s up to 5 minutes
Restart backoff increases exponentially: 10s, 20s, 40s, capped at 5m

question: Which commands diagnose a nginx pod in CrashLoopBackOff?
correct_answers: oc logs <pod> --previous -n <namespace> and oc describe pod <pod> -n <namespace>
Check previous container logs and describe the pod

question: What exit codes appear in previous container state for a crashlooping nginx pod?
correct_answers: Exit code 1 or 137
Previous container exited with code 1 (error) or 137 (OOM/signal kill)

question: What pod status and exit code indicate nginx was OOMKilled?
correct_answers: Pod status OOMKilled with exit code 137
Last State shows OOMKilled and exit code 137 in oc describe pod

question: What immediate memory limits should be set on the nginx deployment after OOMKill?
correct_answers: oc set resources deployment nginx --limits=memory=512Mi --requests=memory=256Mi -n <namespace>
Set limits to 512Mi and requests to 256Mi on deployment nginx

question: What nginx.conf worker settings are recommended for permanent OOM prevention?
correct_answers: worker_processes auto, worker_connections 1024, and a memory alert at 80% of limit
Tune worker_processes to auto and worker_connections to 1024; alert at 80% of the memory limit; add HPA to scale out

question: What PostgreSQL error messages indicate the connection pool is exhausted?
correct_answers: remaining connection slots are reserved for replication and FATAL: sorry, too many clients already
Too many clients already or remaining connection slots reserved for replication

question: How do I kill idle PostgreSQL connections older than 10 minutes?
correct_answers: SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state='idle' AND query_start < now()-interval '10 min';
Run pg_terminate_backend on idle connections where query_start is more than 10 minutes ago

question: How do I increase max_connections to 200 in a CloudNativePG cluster?
correct_answers: Edit the CloudNativePG cluster CR and set postgresql.parameters.max_connections: "200" (requires restart)
Set max_connections to 200 in the CloudNativePG cluster postgresql.parameters; a restart is required

question: What error message and symptom indicate a PVC or disk is full?
correct_answers: no space left on device with PVC usage at 100% visible via oc exec df -h or oc get pvc
Pod logs show no space left on device; df -h inside the pod shows 100% usage

question: How do I clear old nginx log files to free disk space?
correct_answers: oc exec <pod> -n <namespace> -- find /var/log/nginx -name '*.log' -mtime +7 -delete, then oc rollout restart deployment/nginx -n <namespace>
Delete nginx logs older than 7 days under /var/log/nginx and restart deployment/nginx

question: How do I expand a PVC to 20Gi when the storage class supports expansion?
correct_answers: oc patch pvc <pvc-name> -n <namespace> -p '{"spec":{"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"20Gi"}}}}'
Patch the PVC spec.resources.requests.storage to 20Gi
